title: Wilhelm II becomes King of Prussia
fact: Wilhelm II was the last German Emperor from 1888 until his abdication in 1918.

title: Frederick II of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick II was the monarch of Prussia from 1740 until his death in 1786.

title: Frederick III, German Emperor becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick III, or Friedrich III, was German Emperor and King of Prussia for 99 days from 9 March 1888 until his death in June that year, during the Year of the Three Emperors.

title: Wilhelm I becomes King of Prussia
fact: Wilhelm I was King of Prussia from 1861 and German Emperor from 1871 until his death in 1888.

title: Frederick William III of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick William III was King of Prussia from 16 November 1797 until his death in 1840.

title: Friedrich Wilhelm I of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick William I, known as the Soldier King, was King in Prussia and Elector of Brandenburg from 1713 until his death in 1740, as well as Prince of Neuchâtel.

title: Friedrich Wilhelm II of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick William II was King of Prussia from 1786 until his death in 1797.

title: Frederick I of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick I, of the Hohenzollern dynasty, was Elector of Brandenburg (1688–1713) and Duke of Prussia in personal union (Brandenburg–Prussia).

title: Frederick William IV of Prussia becomes King of Prussia
fact: Frederick William IV was King of Prussia from 7 June 1840 until his death in 1861.
